diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 import torch

 from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader

 import torchvision.transforms as T

+import torchvision.transforms.functional as TF

 import timm

 import argparse

 

@@ -41,16 +42,34 @@
 

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     

-    model = timm.create_model('convnext_tiny.fb_in22k_ft_in1k', pretrained=False, num_classes=100)

-    model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device))

-    model.to(device)

-    model.eval()

+    # Load standard best model

+    model1 = timm.create_model('convnext_tiny.fb_in22k_ft_in1k', pretrained=False, num_classes=100)

+    model1.load_state_dict(torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location=device))

+    model1.to(device)

+    model1.eval()

+

+    # Load EMA best model

+    model2 = timm.create_model('convnext_tiny.fb_in22k_ft_in1k', pretrained=False, num_classes=100)

+    model2.load_state_dict(torch.load('checkpoints/best_ema.pt', map_location=device))

+    model2.to(device)

+    model2.eval()

 

     predictions = []

     with torch.no_grad():

         for images in test_loader:

             images = images.to(device)

-            outputs = model(images)

+            images_flipped = TF.hflip(images)

+            

+            # Predictions from model 1 (Standard)

+            out1 = model1(images)

+            out1_f = model1(images_flipped)

+            

+            # Predictions from model 2 (EMA)

+            out2 = model2(images)

+            out2_f = model2(images_flipped)

+            

+            # Ensemble by summing logits (equivalent to averaging for argmax)

+            outputs = out1 + out1_f + out2 + out2_f

             _, predicted = outputs.max(1)

             predictions.extend(predicted.cpu().tolist())
